sources.name: France Travail
sources.license_posture: Provider API terms apply; registry stores metadata only.
sources.notes: Existing FJA integration for French jobs; free approved API credentials are required.

sources.name: La bonne alternance
sources.license_posture: Provider API terms apply; registry stores metadata only.
sources.notes: Existing FJA integration for alternance and apprenticeship roles; bearer token required.

sources.name: Arbeitnow
sources.license_posture: Public API terms apply; do not redistribute posting content.
sources.notes: Existing FJA integration for Europe and remote roles.

sources.name: Remotive
sources.license_posture: Public API terms apply; do not redistribute posting content.
sources.notes: Existing FJA integration; use location restrictions to keep EU-compatible remote roles.

sources.name: Himalayas
sources.license_posture: Public API terms apply; do not redistribute posting content.
sources.notes: Existing FJA integration; filter remote listings for European eligibility.

sources.name: Jobicy
sources.license_posture: Public API terms apply; do not redistribute posting content.
sources.notes: Existing FJA integration with Europe and France geography filters.

sources.name: Greenhouse Job Board API
sources.license_posture: Public board API terms apply; company postings remain provider content.
sources.notes: Existing FJA company-board integration; requires a public board token, not authentication.

sources.name: Lever Postings API
sources.license_posture: Public postings API terms apply; company postings remain provider content.
sources.notes: Existing FJA company-board integration; requires a public site slug, not authentication.

sources.name: Ashby Job Board API
sources.license_posture: Public postings API terms apply; company postings remain provider content.
sources.notes: Existing FJA company-board integration; requires a public board name, not authentication.

sources.name: Recruitee Offers API
sources.license_posture: Public offers API terms apply; company postings remain provider content.
sources.notes: Existing FJA company-board integration; requires a company slug, not authentication.

sources.name: SmartRecruiters Postings API
sources.license_posture: Public postings API terms apply; company postings remain provider content.
sources.notes: Existing FJA company-board integration; requires a company slug, not authentication.

sources.name: Workable Account Jobs API
sources.license_posture: Public account API terms apply; company postings remain provider content.
sources.notes: Existing FJA company-board integration; requires an account slug, not authentication.

sources.name: Personio XML Jobs Feed
sources.license_posture: Public feed terms apply; company postings remain provider content.
sources.notes: Existing FJA company-board integration for a public XML feed; requires a company subdomain.

sources.name: Adzuna API
sources.license_posture: Provider API terms apply; credentials and reuse terms must be checked before integration.
sources.notes: Registry candidate only; use the official developer surface and keep disabled until live verification.

sources.name: Bundesagentur für Arbeit Jobsuche
sources.license_posture: Manual-link only; source site terms apply.
sources.notes: German federal job search; registry exposes only the public manual search entry point.

sources.name: DEVjobs France
sources.license_posture: Manual-link only; source site terms apply.
sources.notes: France-focused developer board; use public manual search links until live access checks are complete.

sources.name: GermanTechJobs
sources.license_posture: Manual-link only; source site terms apply.
sources.notes: German DEVjobs-network variant; manual-open discovery only pending live verification.

sources.license_posture: Manual-link only; source site terms apply.
